BIOM - Biometrics

BIOL765 Sociobiology (4 Credits) Deals with the description and analysis of animal social organizations the adaptive nature of animal societies, the effects of early experience, and the role of communication in the integration of animal groups. Prerequisite: Must have completed a course in behavior. Restriction: Permission of instructor. Credit Only Granted for: BIOL765 or ZOOL665. Formerly: ZOOL665.

BIOL767 Behavioral Endocrinology (3 Credits) The interactive effects of hormones and behavior. Emphasis on the reproductive and stress hormones as they affect the brain and behavior. Prerequisite: BSCI342 or BSCI447. Credit Only Granted for: BIOL767 or ZOOL627. Formerly: ZOOL627.
